languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Break Their Ranks!{/g} works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.
languages.original_text: При применении {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Выхода из окружения{/g} считается, что рядом с целью находится на одного противника больше. Это позволяет использовать {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} даже на цели, у которых на соседних клетках нет врагов.

traits.locale_text: Break Their Ranks! works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this ability to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

При применении Выхода из окружения считается, что рядом с целью находится на одного противника больше. Это позволяет использовать способность даже на цели, у которых на соседних клетках нет врагов.

languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}冲破防线！{/g}生效时，目标盟友始终视为身边额外存在一名敌人。因此，即便目标盟友身边没有敌人，这一{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}也可以生效。
languages.original_text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Break Their Ranks!{/g} works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

traits.locale_text: 冲破防线！生效时，目标盟友始终视为身边额外存在一名敌人。因此，即便目标盟友身边没有敌人，这一{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}也可以生效。

languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}¡Romped sus filas!{/g} funciona como si hubiera un enemigo más adyacente al objetivo. De este modo puede utilizarse esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} con objetivos que no tengan ningún enemigo adyacente.
languages.original_text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Break Their Ranks!{/g} works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

traits.locale_text: ¡Romped sus filas! funciona como si hubiera un enemigo más adyacente al objetivo. De este modo puede utilizarse esta {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} con objetivos que no tengan ningún enemigo adyacente.

languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Durchbrich ihre Reihen!{/g} funktioniert, als wäre ein weiterer Gegner neben dem Ziel. Dadurch kann diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} auch auf Ziele angewendet werden, die keine Gegner in ihrer Nähe haben.
languages.original_text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Break Their Ranks!{/g} works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

traits.locale_text: Durchbrich ihre Reihen! funktioniert, als wäre ein weiterer Gegner neben dem Ziel. Dadurch kann diese {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} auch auf Ziele angewendet werden, die keine Gegner in ihrer Nähe haben.

languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Percée offensive{/g} fonctionne comme si un ennemi de plus était adjacent à la cible. Cela permet d'utiliser cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} sur des cibles qui n'ont pas d'ennemis adjacents.
languages.original_text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Break Their Ranks!{/g} works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

traits.locale_text: Brisez leurs Rangs ! fonctionne comme si un ennemi de plus était adjacent à la cible. Cela permet d'utiliser cette {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} sur des cibles qui n'ont pas d'ennemis adjacents.

languages.text: 戦線を突破せよ！によって、ターゲットに隣接する敵が1体多いかのようにみなされる。これにより、この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}を敵に隣接していないターゲットに使用できる。
languages.original_text: Break Their Ranks! works as if there were one more enemy adjacent to the target. This allows this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} to be used on targets with no enemies adjacent to them.

traits.locale_text: 戦線を突破せよ！によって、ターゲットに隣接する敵が1体多いかのようにみなされる。これにより、この{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}を敵に隣接していないターゲットに使用できる。

languages.text: {g|f:36cb9c507ede4953b22cefac9263aa4d}Saflarını Yar!{/g}, hedefin bitişiğinde bir düşman daha varmış gibi işler. Böylece bu {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g}, bitişiklerinde düşman olmayan hedeflerde de kullanılabilir.
